title: stipa × talassica
intro: Stipa × talassica, also known as Talassky's needle grass or Talass's feather grass, is a hybrid species of the Stipa genus, native to Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stipa × talassica include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. Stipa × talassica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments.
